executive_summary.decision_snapshot: Proceed with the transfer only after partner space, final taxes, and backup cash pricing are confirmed on the same day.
executive_summary.value_signal: Premium review favors the award path when redemption value stays above the cash equivalent and flexibility risk remains acceptable.
executive_summary.priority_watchout: Availability volatility is the main execution risk.

recommendation.primary_option: Confirm partner seat space, then transfer points and issue the one-way award booking.
recommendation.booking_strategy: Run a same-session comparison across cash fare, direct transfer, and delayed booking fallback before moving points.
recommendation.why_this_option: This preserves optionality while capturing better point value if award space is real and taxes remain controlled.
tradeoffs: Award space can disappear before transfer completes.
Cash may still be superior if taxes increase or routing quality drops.
recommendation.fallback_option: Book cash if award inventory closes or taxes erode redemption value.

options.label: Cash booking
options.strength: Fastest path with no transfer risk.

options.label: Points transfer and award booking
options.strength: Best value when partner space is available.

options.label: Wait and re-check later
options.estimated_cost: Potentially unchanged cash fare or lost award seat
options.strength: Preserves flexibility but increases execution risk.

fare_points_comparison.comparison_note: Premium review includes a fallback path so the client can decide between value capture and booking certainty.

assumptions: Travel is one-way and dates remain flexible within a narrow booking window.
Transfer ratio is 1.0 with no live bonus applied.
No elite benefits, companion certificates, or status upgrades are included.
Taxes and fees are checked at booking time, not estimated from archived pricing.

next_action.immediate_step: Check live partner availability and total taxes, then execute the transfer only if both remain favorable.
next_action.watch_item: Monitor same-day award inventory and cash fare movement before locking the final booking.
next_action.client_decision_gate: Choose between higher potential value and lower execution risk.
